name: HougekiShoujo
publisher: チーム魔愚路, TeamMAGURO, Digital-Touch Co., Ltd.
short_description: "1·Shot·1·Reload" High school girls in pixel art battle in a chaotic 3-on-3 cannon brawl! Drive opponents to the brink and blast them away with a cannon shot!
detailed_description:
Guidelines for Streaming and Uploading Gameplay Videos

Guidelines for Streaming and Uploading Gameplay Videos

©魔愚路 2025 welcomes gameplay video streaming and uploads by individuals and corporations alike.

You are free to stream and upload gameplay videos by following the guidelines below. Before starting your stream, please read and adhere to the following.

  • Mandatory Mentioning of "Hougeki Shoujo"
    When streaming or uploading gameplay videos, ensure that the game title "Hougeki Shoujo" is included in the video title and/or stream title.

  • Revenue from Streaming
    Earning revenue through platform features, such as advertisements or donations, is allowed. However, it must comply with the platform's policy.

  • Inappropriate Contents are Strictly Prohibited
    Content containing slander or violating public morals is strictly prohibited in gameplay videos and streams.

    Videos that violate these guidelines or are deemed inappropriate may be subject to removal requests or other legal actions.

  • Restrictions on Streaming Platforms
    Do not use platforms that fall under the following categories:

    • Websites restricted to viewers aged 18 and above

    • Websites violating public morals

    • Websites related to religious, political, or anti-social activities

  • Liability for Damages or Issues
    ©魔愚路 2025 assumes no responsibility for damages or issues arising from gameplay streaming or uploads. The streamer shall be held responsible should any problem arise.

  • Changes to Guidelines
    These guidelines are subject to change without notice. Upon modified, the revised guidelines will apply to all subsequent streams and uploads.


About the Game

Hougeki Shoujo is a 3-vs-3 competitive 2.5D shooting action game where high school girls battle it out with their trusty cannons! The game features a single-reload, single-shot system—you only have one chance to dodge an enemy shot to avoid immediate elimination! Win a round by wiping out the opposing team. The first team to win three rounds claims victory! Encircle your opponents and seize victory with a decisive shot! The game features simple, intuitive controls. You can tell when your shot is ready by the ammo icon that appears next to your character’s username. Use cute emotes and chat with your allies and opponents!
